warnings: The diff is mostly evidence-only, but the new root pytest.ini changes default pytest collection to testpaths = tests. That makes the local runner default gate pass while excluding sdk/python/tests from a root pytest -q run. The SDK has its own pytest configuration in sdk/python/pyproject.toml, so this is not a confirmed release-gate weakening, but it is a gate-coverage risk that should be reviewed before merge.

The issue is P0 release-integrity and the local evidence notes that Opus consultation was not executed because the runner prompt constrained the phase to local files, local command output, and issue text. This is consistent with the prompt, but remains a project-process exception to record.

Root-to-HEAD git diff --check still reports historical whitespace and EOF findings outside the focused v1.5.0..v1.5.10 boundary. The focused boundary check passes, but the broader hygiene failure remains residual risk.
